welcome.title: Welcome to GitCortex
welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your environment in a few simple steps. You can skip this and configure everything later in Settings.

model.title: Configure an AI Model
model.subtitle: GitCortex needs at least one AI model to run workflows. You can add more later in Settings.
model.verifyFailed: Verification failed. Please check your API key and settings.
model.skipHint: You can skip this step and configure models later in Settings → Models.

project.title: Set Up a Project
project.subtitle: Select a working directory for your first project. This is where GitCortex will manage your code.
project.skipHint: You can skip this and create projects later from the Board.
project.notGitRepo: This directory is not a Git repository

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect GitCortex with your favorite tools. All integrations are optional.

feishu.label: Feishu / Lark
feishu.description: Receive workflow notifications and interact with GitCortex through Feishu bot.

integrations.skipHint: You can configure integrations anytime in Settings.

done.title: You're All Set!
done.subtitle: GitCortex is ready to go. Start by creating your first workflow.
done.rerunHint: You can re-run this setup anytime from Settings.
